name: Oyster Fritters Cajun-Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a pan at approximately 300 degrees F.
2. Saute the oysters in the melted butter for 2-3 minutes, then remove and quarter them.
3. In a bowl, mix all other ingredients including the oyster liquid. Adjust the thickness of the fritter batter by varying the amount of oyster liquid added.
4. Mix in the oysters.
5. Drop tablespoon portions of the batter into the pre-heated oil and fry until golden brown.
